THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LAM ENGINEERING INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAN, JEAN $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $109.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,109.50, ALL PLANS, DRAWINGS AND OTHER WORK PROVIDED BY PLAINTIFF FOR THE PROJECT WHICH IS THE SUBJECT OF THIS ACTION SHALL REMAIN THE PROPERTY OF PLAINTIFF.
